title: Devi
desc: After returning from overseas, Arun marries Jaba, an orphan who contributes to the temple. But Arun's vindictive relatives try to drive the couple apart.

title: Classroom
desc: After the murder of a school boy, everyone in the institution comes under suspicion.

title: Loveria
desc: Car mechanich Aditya falls in love with Sweety, a rich, spoilt brat.Although they want to get married but her father opposes the relationship.

title: Maayakumari
desc: A director sets out to make a biopic on a famed actress and explores her disappearance.

title: Hero
desc: Shubhankhar's father, a constable, dreams of making him an IPS officer. But Shubhankhar only wants to enjoy life. He loves Puja, whose brother, a police superintendent, opposes their love.

title: Mister Bhaduri
desc: Aniruddha, the boss of a company, pretends to stay with someone in a bungalow.

title: Jongole Mitin Mashi
desc: A detective is tasked with investigating a gang of poachers hunting wild elephants.

title: Rosogolla
desc: Tracing the life and times of Nobin Chandra Das, a budding sweet maker from Kolkata. Inspired by his beloved to create a new sweet, he invents the iconic dessert, Rosogulla.

title: Action
desc: Raka always gets what she desires, until she is rejected by Akash, a fellow student.

title: Suryavaanshi...The Family
desc: DCP Veer Sooryavanshi, the chief of the Anti-Terrorism Squad in India, tries to bring down a terrorist organization with which he has a history.

title: Kumari Maa
desc: Tridev falls into a rabbit hole after thinking he murdered his family.

title: Mr. Majnu
desc: A charming flirt who has never been in a serious relationship with anyone finds himself in unfamiliar territory when he falls in love with a woman.

title: Sindur Khela
desc: A misunderstanding leads two best friends, Shubho and Rajeeb, down an unexpected path.

title: Kakababur Protyaborton
desc: A famous hotel in Nairobi, Kenya, is about to close. People have always avoided the hotel, and two men go to investigate.

title: Kelor Kirti
desc: The lives of three young couples become complicated because of a dazzling woman.

title: Villain (2013)
desc: Villain 2013 unfolds action-packed sequences, suspenseful plotlines, and morally complex characters, delivering gripping cinematic entertainment.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, a famous Indian boxer, tries to revive his career after a tragic accident.

title: Dada
desc: Story of a local goon and his transformation.

title: Bagha Jatin
desc: Jatindranath Mukherjee is revered for his role in India's freedom struggle.

title: Banglar Badhu
desc: When her husband strays onto the wrong path, Mala decides to help him. However, Gokul, her brother-in-law, has his eyes set on their property.

title: Rong Beronger Korhi
desc: An anthology of four short stories portraying the impact of money on relationships.

title: Daal Bati Churma Chacchori
desc: Anand finds new love with Barsha after breaking up with his non-Bengali girlfriend.

title: Sentimentaal
desc: Suryaa Roy is transferred to Raghunathpur, where she faces the challenge of dealing with local politician Rudrani Chowdhury, who runs illegal businesses, creating a world of corruption and danger.

title: Generation Aami
desc: A 17-year-old rebellious teenager discovers himself with the help of a 19-year-old girl.

title: Phool Aar Pathor
desc: Nandu plots for Mastermoshai's property, while his daughter's suicide leads Swadhin and Azad to expose the rapist.

title: Ami Sudhu Tor Holam
desc: A man falls in love, but discovers the woman's relationship with another man.

title: Highway (2014)
desc: Sohini, Bengali, marries Ashwin, non-Bengali. Feeling lost, they seek to understand each other's perspectives.

title: Mon Sudhu Toke Chai
desc: Director Subrata Halder, starring Sarmistha Acharjee, Biswanath, Supriyo Dutta.

title: Sesh Bichar
desc: Rajiv and Subhra's marriage hits a snag when Subhra's ex, Raja, reappears. Meanwhile, Mishti, a neglected housewife, navigates her own struggles in their tangled lives.

title: Kakhan Tomar Asbe Telephone
desc: A chirpy radio jockey falls for a clever mechanical engineer after a single phone call, but complications arise as she's already engaged.

title: Annyo Naa
desc: The film is a story of a simple woman who likes taking care of her family. But with a husband with the ambition to soar high in the world of cinema, she finds it difficult to cope with his lifestyle.

title: Golmaal
desc: Four goofy friends create endless confusion with their crazy plans, turning every situation into laughter and chaos.

title: Meghnad Bodh Rohoshyo
desc: Famous writer Asimavo Bose vanishes, allies showing animosity, deepening the mystery surrounding his disappearance.

title: Ghatak
desc: Kashi opposes the torturous regime of Katya and ends up compromising the safety of his family and relatives.

title: Haami 2
desc: Bhutu and Chini's friendship is strained by their parents' judgments.

title: Rangbaaz
desc: Madhurima falls in love with Raj when they get stranded on an island. But Raj is uninterested, as he is on a mission to avenge his father's death.

title: Karna Subarner Guptodhon
desc: 3 friends vacationing stumble upon a riddle, leading to a treasure. Their quest is filled with challenging obstacles.

title: Tiger
desc: Tiger movie directed by Swapan Saha, starring Mithun Chakraborty, Debashree Roy, Rajatava Dutta.
